# vertices

**Type Property**

An option to place graph nodes at each vertex in the generated mesh.

## Declaration

```swift
static var vertices: GKMeshGraphTriangulationMode { get }
```

## Constants

- **centers**: An option to place graph nodes at the center of each polygon in the generated mesh.
- **edgeMidpoints**: An option to place graph nodes at the midpoint of each in the generated mesh.
